creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Tested in tinderbox, 7,8,9, amd and i386. compiles on everything but 7.4, i386.
Looks like an upstream issue on (older?) cc compiler.

logs:
cd /work/a/ports/chinese/fcitx/work/fcitx-4.2.3/data/table && /usr/bin/tar xzmvf 
/work/a/ports/chinese/fcitx/work/fcitx-4.2.3/data/table/table.tar.gz
x cj.txt
x db.txt
x erbi.txt
x qxm.txt
x wanfeng.txt
x wbpy.txt
x wbx.txt
x zrm.txt
/usr/local/bin/cmake -E cmake_progress_report /work/a/ports/chinese/fcitx/work/fcitx-4.2.3/CMakeFiles 
[ 92%] Generating db.mb
cd /work/a/ports/chinese/fcitx/work/fcitx-4.2.3/data/table && ../../tools/txt2mb db.txt db.mb
Source File Format Error!

<http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell/zh-fcitx-4.2.3_3.log>

Fix: mark BROKEN on i386/7.4 for not until upstream fixes it.

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/chinese/fcitx/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.47
diff -u -r1.47 Makefile
--- Makefile	10 Jun 2012 13:00:35 -0000	1.47
+++ Makefile	16 Jun 2012 10:26:17 -0000
@@ -46,6 +46,10 @@
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
+.if ${OSVERSION} < 800000 && ${ARCH} == i386
+BROKEN=	Will not compile on i386 before 8.0
+.endif
+
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MGTK2}
 USE_GNOME+=	gtk20
 PLIST_SUB+=	GTK2=""
How-To-Repeat: 
try to install on i386, 7.4 stable.
